actual_adoption_share.rationale: Risk 7 names 20% adoption as the catastrophic-miss scenario; base just below the 40% target reflects realistic distributor uptake friction under Pragmatic Harmonization timelines.

actual_total_project_cost_eur.rationale: IT-capacity grants (€900M) + Public Reference Distributor (€150M) + testing/audit FTE + clearing top-ups + governance overhead; base at the ceiling reflects realistic Builder-scenario execution; upper bound captures Risk 3 €200M working-capital shock.

peak_daily_clearing_obligation_eur.rationale: Baseline cross-border ticket volume × peak-day multiplier at Year-5 scale; base near the float break-even (€200M / 1.5 buffer ≈ €133M) reflects design intent; upper bound captures Risk 3 velocity-spike scenarios.

actual_binding_standards_months.rationale: Plan target is 18 months with provisional binding at Month 6; base just over target reflects realistic incumbent-lobbying friction (Risk 6); upper bound captures Risk 1 enforcement-failure cascade.

actual_complaint_reduction_share.rationale: Plan targets 50% reduction; base just below target reflects realistic OSDM data-layer stability (Risk 2); upper bound reflects Public Reference Distributor uptime above 90% target.
